name: 01 Navigation
title: The Hacker's Compass: pwd, cd, ls & Navigation
description: The definitive guide to stop fearing the black screen. Learn to move through the file system at the speed of thought.

name: 02 File Management
title: File Management: The Art of Creating and Destroying
description: The definitive and detailed guide to manipulating the file system: creating complex structures, moving data, and the dangerous art of deleting without a recycle bin.

name: 03 View Edit
title: View and Edit: The Master Text Guide
description: The definitive guide (+500 lines) to mastering text file manipulation in the terminal. From 'cat' to 'vim' mastery.

name: 04 Search Filter
title: Search and Filters: The Digital Detective (find, grep)
description: The definitive guide (+500 lines) to finding any lost file or hidden text in your system. Master 'find', 'grep', 'locate', and basic regular expressions.

name: 05 System Help
title: The Art of Asking for Help: The Master Guide (man, info)
